vocab.meaning: điều chỉnh đồ đạc cá nhân cho phù hợp
vocab.example: I always tailor my belongings to the specific demands of the destination to avoid unnecessary clutter.

vocab.meaning: hướng đến sự tiện dụng/thực tế
vocab.example: When hiking, my packing strategy is strictly utility-oriented, prioritizing survival gear over comfort items.

vocab.meaning: những thiết bị công nghệ không thể thiếu
vocab.example: For business trips, my laptop and noise-canceling headphones are indispensable gadgets that I never leave behind.
I prefer to travel light during weekend getaways to maintain maximum mobility and avoid baggage fees.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng dự phòng cho tình huống bất ngờ
vocab.example: Even for short outings, I usually pack a few contingency items like a compact umbrella or a portable power bank.

vocab.meaning: trang thiết bị phù hợp với địa hình
vocab.example: Exploring the highlands requires terrain-specific gear, particularly sturdy waterproof boots and thermal layers.
I adopt a minimalist approach when visiting crowded cities to keep my hands free and reduce the risk of theft.
I try to avoid carrying cumbersome luggage when I have to navigate public transport systems in a foreign country.
I am always mindful of the cultural norms of the places I visit, which dictates the type of clothing I pack.

vocab.meaning: tủ đồ linh hoạt (nhiều công năng)
vocab.example: For multi-destination trips, I pack a versatile wardrobe consisting of pieces that can be easily layered or dressed up.
